ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neuroimaging" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each imaging result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient ID */,
  "ventricles_bl" REAL /* Volume of the ventricles at baseline */,
  "hippocampus_bl" REAL /* Volume of the hippocampus at baseline */,
  "wholebrain_bl" REAL /* Volume of the whole brain at baseline */,
  "entorhinal_bl" REAL /* Volume of the entorhinal cortex at baseline */,
  "fusiform_bl" REAL /* Volume of the fusiform gyrus at baseline */,
  "midtemp_bl" REAL /* Volume of the middle temporal gyrus at baseline */,
  "icv_bl" REAL /* Intracranial volume at baseline */,
  "fdg_bl" REAL /* FDG-PET uptake at baseline */,
  "av45_bl" REAL /* AV45-PET uptake at baseline */,
  "image_date" TEXT /* Date when the imaging was conducted */,
  "image_location" TEXT /* Location where the imaging was conducted */,
  "image_conducted_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who conducted the imaging */,
  "image_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the image (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations during the imaging */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genetic_markers" (
  "genetic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic marker result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient ID */,
  "apoe4_0" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient has 0 copies of the APOE4 gene */,
  "apoe4_1" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient has 1 copy of the APOE4 gene */,
  "apoe4_2" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient has 2 copies of the APOE4 gene */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the genetic test was conducted */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the genetic test was conducted */,
  "test_conducted_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who conducted the genetic test */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations during the genetic test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genetic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifestyle_factors" (
  "lifestyle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifestyle factor result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient ID */,
  "calcium_0" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient has calcium intake of 0 */,
  "calcium_1" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient has calcium intake of 1 */,
  "any_bt_0" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient has any blood thinning (BT) medication of 0 */,
  "any_bt_1" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient has any blood thinning (BT) medication of 1 */,
  "vitamin_d_0" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient has vitamin D intake of 0 */,
  "vitamin_d_1" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient has vitamin D intake of 1 */,
  "any_chol_0" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient has any cholesterol medication of 0 */,
  "any_chol_1" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient has any cholesterol medication of 1 */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Detailed description of the patient's diet */,
  "exercise_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of exercise (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "stress_levels" TEXT /* Patient's stress levels (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "sleep_quality" TEXT /* Quality of sleep (e.g., poor, fair, good, excellent) */,
  "social_activity" TEXT /* Level of social activity (e.g., low, moderate, high) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations related to lifestyle factors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifestyle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment outcome */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient ID */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment administered */,
  "treatment_start_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment started */,
  "treatment_end_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment ended */,
  "response" TEXT /* Patient's response to the treatment */,
  "progression" TEXT /* Progression of the disease during the treatment period */,
  "follow_up_dates" TEXT /* Array of follow-up dates */,
  "follow_up_notes" TEXT /* Array of notes for each follow-up */,
  "adverse_events" TEXT /* Any adverse events experienced during the treatment */,
  "adverse_event_dates" TEXT /* Array of dates when adverse events occurred */,
  "treatment_dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the treatment */,
  "treatment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the treatment (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
